nasb.text: And with many other words he solemnly testified and kept on exhorting them, saying, “Be saved from this perverse generation!”

esv.text: And with many other words he bore witness and continued to exhort them, saying, “Save yourselves from this crooked generation.”

cnv.text: 彼得還用許多別的話，鄭重作證，並且勸勉他們，說：“你們應當救自己脫離這彎曲的世代！”

ccb.text: 然后，彼得还讲了许多话警戒、劝勉他们，说：“你们要保守自己脱离这邪恶的世代。”

csbs.text: 彼得还说许多别的话郑重地做见证，又劝告他们说：“你们从这扭曲的世代中得救吧！”
